description: As a logistics manager analyzing regional performance, create a geographic map visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset (located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\). Create a Choropleth/Filled Map visualization mapping 'Revenue' by 'State' (or State/Province). Save the workbook as 'Revenue_Map' and export the project as 'Revenue_Map.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Revenue_Map.dva.
